name: MANCHESTER PLUMBING & HEATING
subtitle: Plumbing · Heating · Gas
tagline: Same-day response. No call-out fee. Nearly two decades keeping Manchester’s homes warm, dry and working.
pageTitle: MANCHESTER PLUMBING & HEATING — Plumbing · Heating in Manchester
servicesSubtitle: One trusted team for the whole house.

services.name: Emergency Repairs
services.desc: Burst pipes, no heating, leaks — we arrive within the hour. 24/7, 365 days.

services.name: Boiler Installation
services.desc: New boiler supply & fit, annual servicing, landlord gas safety certificates. Gas Safe certified.

services.name: Joinery & Carpentry
services.desc: Bespoke shelving, doors, fitted furniture and small extensions. Measured and made on site.

services.name: Bathroom Fitting
services.desc: Full bathroom renovations — plumbing, tiling, install. Free design visit included.

services.name: Central Heating
services.desc: Radiators, power flushing, smart thermostats and underfloor heating.

services.name: Landlord Services
services.desc: Gas safety (CP12), EICR reports and planned maintenance for rental properties.

aboutTitle: Two decades of getting it right.
aboutParagraphs: Manchester Plumbing & Heating has kept the city’s homes warm, dry and working for nearly two decades — same-day response, no call-out fee, and engineers who explain the job in plain English.
Boilers, bathrooms, emergencies and landlord certificates, all under one roof. Clear quotes, tidy work, and a guarantee on every job.
Every engineer is qualified, insured and background-checked. No jargon, no upsells, no surprises.

reviews.name: Gemma Patel
reviews.text: Burst pipe at 11pm on a Tuesday. They were here in 45 minutes. Lifesavers.

reviews.name: Dave O'Connor
reviews.text: New boiler fitted last month. Tidy, polite, explained everything. Best of four quotes.

reviews.name: The Khans
reviews.text: Used them for a full bathroom. Plumbing, tiling, joinery — one team, zero stress.
